docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028) AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, JOY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOPRA, JOY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 145 LEAVENWORTH STREET #406 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $63.60. (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79313028), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC SERVED MAR-06-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-07-2026, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, JOY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, JOY DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
